Writings & Selected Press

Press highlights, exhibition review write-ups, and academic essays discussing my work and practice.

📰 Selected Press Reviews

"This interdisciplinary installation is a compelling inquiry into the unseen frameworks of daily technology, offering viewers a rare physical contact with ambient signal currents." — Selected Art Journal / Publication Review (Year)
"An elegant merging of raw electronic design and high spatial minimalism. The installations succeed in making the ephemeral fully tangible." — Selected Press Critic Name, Exhibition Essay (Year)

✍️ Academic Papers & Essays

  • "Transmitting the Ephemeral: Open Hardware in Fine Arts"

Journal of Media Design and Creative Technology (Year)

An inquiry into physical computing workflows for interdisciplinary media installations.

  • "Feedback Loops and Physical Computing"

International Creative Technology Conference Proceedings (Year)

Paper documenting sensor modulation grids and real-time environment sonic mapping.
